posts.text:
BREAKING: An oil tanker operator paid Iran a $2 million fee for safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday, per FT.

Iran is now charging "favored" countries millions per oil tanker for safe passage through Hormuz.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
